fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-7 spec finalization primary focus; target launch next week (week of July 7)
No new EL EIPs for devnet-7; spec update to follow call; aim to beat ACDT if clients create branches
Repricing numbers (EIP-8038, EIP-2780) treated as stable for devnet-7; final confirmation pending full benchmark suite results by next ACDE

glamsterdam_devnet7_open_items.highlight: EIP-8038: additional pre-access check before slot DB read; behavioral spec change needed in EIP or EIP-7928; PR #11854 opened
EIP-8037 / EIP-2780 intrinsic gas: Dragan's PR #11844 supersedes PRs #11778 and #3045; clients to review Discord thread before ACDT
Felix's deposit contract disable-deposits feature (sys-asm PR #49) accepted for devnet-7; immutable-only option rejected
ePBS deadlines for devnet-7 set to 3s attestation / 6s payload / 9s PTC; PR to consensus-specs to be opened and finalized at ACDT Monday

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-8250 (Key Nonces): multi-lane nonce system via nullifier-keyed nonce pairs in VUBS system contract; enables trustless private tx senders
EIP-8272 (Recent Routes): standardized per-block Merkle root buffer system contract in VUBS; enables FOCIL inclusion guarantees for ZK privacy proofs
EIP-7862 (Delayed State Root): header carries pre-state root instead of post-state root; reduces builder/prover hashing load across thousands of candidate blocks
EIP-8146 (BAL Sidecars): BAL gossiped separately from execution payload; allows EL prefetching before transactions arrive, improving scaling
EIP-8298 (SETCODEFROM opcode): copies code hash from existing on-chain contract to current address; reduces duplicate deployment cost vs. CREATE2 or proxies

organizational.highlight: Hegota EIP proposal deadline set to August 6, 2026 (5 weeks, accounting for ACDC offset)
Pooja: Meta EIP-7773 out of sync; EIP-7610 confirmed in Glamsterdam (SFI); EIP-8282 HTML fix needed before merge; all Glamsterdam EIP authors should move drafts to Review status

action_items.action: Review Dragan's EIP-2780 intrinsic gas PR #11844 and weigh in on Discord thread before ACDT
Open consensus-specs PR for 3s/6s/9s ePBS deadlines; finalize at ACDT Monday
Fix HTML issue on EIP-8282 so PR can merge and Meta EIP PR can follow

decisions.decision: Felix's disable-deposits feature for the ePBS builder deposit contract (sys-asm PR #49) accepted for devnet-7
ePBS slot deadlines for devnet-7: attestation = 3s, payload = 6s, PTC = 9s; to be confirmed at ACDT
Hegota EIP proposal deadline set to August 6, 2026
PFI for Hegota: EIP-8250 (Key Nonces), EIP-8272 (Recent Routes), EIP-7862 (Delayed State Root), EIP-8146 (BAL Sidecars), EIP-8298 (SETCODEFROM opcode)

targets.target: All devnet-7 spec PRs merged by end of week (July 4, 2026)
Glamsterdam devnet-7 launch targeting week of July 7 (Wednesday ~July 9), pending Alpha 12 release with EIP-7688 and deadline changes
